# VerseSmart

> Any Bible verse, Global perspectives, What's yours? VerseSmart lets you compare how theologians from different cultures, traditions, and worldviews interpret any Bible verse — all in one place.

## Pages

- [/](/): Home — pick any Bible verse and compare five classic commentaries.
- [/verse/{slug}](/verse/john-3-16): Static commentary pages for popular verses (e.g. /verse/john-3-16, /verse/psalms-23-1, /verse/romans-8-28).
- [/pricing](/pricing): Pricing — unlimited access plans.
- [/privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [/terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [/refund](/refund): Refund policy.
